title: Absorption Costing: Absorption costing treats fixed manufacturing overhead as an expense in...
summary: Evaluate how absorption costing treats fixed overhead as inventory cost rather than a period expense.
prompt: Absorption costing treats fixed manufacturing overhead as an expense in the period incurred.
solution: Under absorption costing, fixed manufacturing overhead is included in the cost of inventory and only expensed when the inventory is sold, affecting profit reporting based on inventory levels.
